author: txtiger
content:
Does anyone know the current stance on precompiles? I know they are *strongly discouraged* but PQC does not really run well on the EVM.

Would many *specific* precompiles be better for implementation than one monolithic one? I drafted [this update to EIP-7932](https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11571) based on that assumption, but some clarification would be helpful.
